call.transcript:
Agent: Hi, welcome to AI Automation Hub, my name is Sally. What’s your name and what brings you here today?
User: Yeah. My name is John, and I'm from a company called AI Euro Estates, and we're looking to find ways automate our marketing processes.
Agent: Nice to meet you, John! Automating marketing processes sounds like a great way to boost efficiency. Could you tell me a bit more about the specific challenges you're facing with your current marketing setup?
User: Yeah. We're just finding a way to increase the production our reels.
User: Instagram especially.
User: and we're finding ways to automate parts of our screenwriting process.
Agent: Got it, automating the screenwriting for Instagram reels sounds interesting! When are you ideally hoping to have this automation up and running?
User: You're looking at for it to be up before, you know, the year, so in the next three weeks.
Agent: Thanks for sharing that timeline, John. Just to get a better sense, is there a budget range you are looking at for this project?
User: You're on five thousand.
Agent: Thanks for sharing that, John. Could I also get your email address so I can save your details?
User: Yeah. Uh, you can reach me at john at real estate heroes dot com.
